name: filter_condition with item_defaults: nil field uses default before comparison
description: Fuzz-discovered (30k rounds, divergence_000218): filter_condition value=null + item_defaults={x:'fallback'}. Go BuildInput substitutes default for nil BEFORE the operator executes. C++/Java/Python that bypass BuildInput see raw null → match → incorrectly remove.

cases.name: nil field with default should NOT be filtered
